name: Notion Workspace
description: Pages, databases, blocks, search via Notion's official MCP

env_vars.how_to_set: notion.so/my-integrations → New integration → Copy Internal Integration Token

tools.name: search_pages
tools.description: Search across all Notion pages and databases accessible to the integration by title or content

query.description: Text to search for in page and database titles

filter.description: Filter by object type: page or database

tools.name: get_page
tools.description: Retrieve a Notion page's properties and metadata by its page ID

page_id.description: The Notion page ID (UUID format or from page URL)

tools.name: create_page
tools.description: Create a new Notion page inside a parent page or database with properties and content blocks

parent_id.description: ID of the parent page or database to create the new page in

properties.description: Database properties to set if parent is a database (key-value map)

children.description: Array of Notion block objects to add as page content

tools.name: update_page
tools.description: Update properties of an existing Notion page such as title, status, date, or any database property

page_id.description: The Notion page ID to update

properties.description: Key-value map of page properties to update using Notion property format

archived.description: Set to true to archive (soft-delete) the page

tools.name: query_database
tools.description: Query a Notion database with filters and sorting to retrieve matching page entries

database_id.description: The Notion database ID to query

filter.description: Notion filter object to narrow results (e.g. by property value)

sorts.description: Array of sort objects specifying property name and direction

page_size.description: Number of results to return per request (max 100)
